message.reasoning_content:
We are to validate extracted ASHRAE Guideline 36 items. We must return JSON with verdicts. Each verdict includes candidate_id, is_valid_guideline36_knowledge (boolean), reason (string), and category_if_not (null if valid, otherwise one of specified). The list of categories: front_matter, toc, generic_definition, unsupported, duplicate, other. We need to decide for each candidate.

Now, analyze each candidate:

cand_2cd77d8592b0af9a: knowledge_type: application_guidance, title: "CO2 DCV Overcooling Risk", section_id: "5.5.3". Summary and evidence quote are about CO2 DCV in cooling-only zones leading to overcooling and recommendation. This is operational guidance from Guideline 36. It is useful, grounded knowledge. Valid.

cand_84583722157107a0: application_guidance, "Reheat Box Recommended for High Minimum Ventilation or DCV", section 5.5.3. Evidence: recommendation to use reheat box if minimum ventilation >25% cooling max or DCV used. Valid operational guidance.

cand_566fdfaafc65498d: application_guidance, "DCV Logic Not Provided for Cooling-Only Boxes", section 5.5.3. Evidence: DCV logic not provided for cooling-only boxes because of overcooling. Valid.

cand_b9ec9a24a4467b49: application_guidance, "Heating Capability of Cooling-Only Terminal Units", section 5.5.3. Evidence: cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when AHU supply air > 3°C above room. This is specific operational knowledge. Valid.

cand_23dda6961710981b: parameter_spec, "Cooling Maximum Endpoint per Zone Group Mode", section 5.5.4. Evidence: "Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0" - this seems like a table entry. Possibly from a table mapping zone group modes to endpoints. The summary states cooling maximum endpoint is Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. This is a parameter specification. Valid.

cand_27663983e013b7d8: parameter_spec, "Minimum Endpoint per Zone Group Mode", section 5.5.4. Evidence: "Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0". Valid.

cand_183b541806f6eb4d: parameter_spec, "Heating Maximum Endpoint per Zone Group Mode", section 5.5.4. Evidence: "Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vcool-max Vcool-max 0". Valid.

cand_484a6df102eb8883: operational_sequence, "Cooling State Airflow Setpoint Mapping", section 5.5.5.1. Evidence: "When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped...". Valid sequence.

cand_80102d588cf80ad4: operational_sequence, "Cooling State Airflow Setpoint Limit when Supply Air Warmer than Room", section 5.5.5.1. Evidence: "If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint." Valid.

cand_fb2b8e7286cc94eb: operational_sequence, "Deadband State Airflow Setpoint", section 5.5.5.2. Evidence: "When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint." Valid.

cand_e2b88ec478c2c691: operational_sequence, "Heating State Airflow Setpoint Mapping", section 5.5.5.3. Evidence: "When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped...". Valid.

cand_cee33768b237dde0: operational_sequence, "Heating State Airflow Setpoint Limit when Supply Air Not Warm Enough", section 5.5.5.3. Evidence: if supply air < 3°C above room, setpoint no higher than minimum. Valid.

cand_8f3cbd4d1a03c068: operational_sequence, "VAV Damper Airflow Control", section 5.5.5.4. Evidence: "The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint." Valid.

cand_3460bd47e6b46836: fault_diagnostic_rule, "Low Airflow Alarm Level 4", section 5.5.6.1. Evidence: low airflow alarm if <70% for 10 min. Valid.

cand_67a064e46fb27b7d: fault_diagnostic_rule, "Low Airflow Alarm Level 3", section 5.5.6.1. Evidence: <50% for 10 min. Valid.

cand_3e53ec23b6522009: fault_diagnostic_rule, "Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Importance Multiplier Zero", section 5.5.6.1. Evidence: if zone importance multiplier 0, suppress low airflow alarms. Valid.

cand_40bc8f4d896da986: fault_diagnostic_rule, "Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm", section 5.5.6.2. Evidence: if fan OFF and airflow > max(10% Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 min, alarm. Valid.

cand_61d40dec9367b17b: fault_diagnostic_rule, "Leaking Damper Alarm", section 5.5.6.3. Evidence: damper 0%, airflow > threshold for 10 min while fan on. Valid.

cand_f9788a0a54441950: application_guidance, "Airflow Alarm Threshold Determination", section 5.5.6.3. Evidence: constant thresholds depend on transducer/A/D converter accuracy. This is guidance on setting thresholds. Valid.

cand_51e73825473addda: commissioning_step, "Testing/Commissioning Overrides", section 5.5.7. Evidence: Provide software switches to force setpoints, etc. This is a commissioning procedure. Valid.

All appear to be valid, grounded ASHRAE Guideline 36 operational knowledge. None look like front matter, TOC, generic definitions, unsupported, or duplicates. So all should have is_valid: true, category_if_not: null, and a brief reason like "Operational guidance from ASHRAE Guideline 36" or similar. I'll assign reasons accordingly.

Now, produce JSON. The response must be strict JSON only, no extra text. Output shape: {"verdicts": [list of objects]}

I'll output each.
